---
permalink: /llms.txt
layout: null
---
# ActiveDocs Documentation

> Explore guides and tutorials to start building with ActiveDocs.

## Sections

- [Developers]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/llms.txt) — Build integrated document automation solutions with the ActiveDocs API.
- [Template Designers]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/llms.txt) — No-code intelligent template building.

## All Pages

### Developers

- [API Overview]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-overview/llms.txt) — Key concepts, authentication, date formats, and general conventions.
- [Automated Document Production]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-jobs/llms.txt) — Create, monitor, and manage document assembly jobs.
- [Design Component Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/developers/api-design-components/llms.txt) — Search and retrieve Design Components.

### Template Designers

- [Glossary of Terms]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/glossary/llms.txt) — Key terminology used throughout ActiveDocs.
- [Design Components]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-components/llms.txt) — Templates, Template Sets, Snippets, Data Views, Design Item Sets, and Workflows.
- [Design Items]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-items/llms.txt) — Active Fields, Groups, Repeating Item Groups, Charts, Snippet Links, and Rules.
- [Introduction to WorkCenter Client]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter-client/llms.txt) — Access and navigate the WorkCenter Client.
- [WorkCenter Sites]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter-sites/llms.txt) — Add, remove, and manage WorkCenter Site connections.
- [Folders and Organization]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/folders-and-organization/llms.txt) — Create folders, configure approval workflows, and organize Design Components.
- [Template Design Process]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/template-design-process/llms.txt) — Plan, format, and import Word documents as Templates.
- [The ActiveDocs Ribbon]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/activedocs-ribbon/llms.txt) — ActiveDocs tab in Microsoft Word and its design tools.
- [The Design Items Dialog]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-items-dialog/llms.txt) — Primary interface for managing Design Items.
- [Groups and Active Fields]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/groups-and-active-fields/llms.txt) — Create Groups, Active Fields, calculations, and value lists.
- [The Designer Pane]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/designer-pane/llms.txt) — Locate and manage Design Item Markers.
- [Data Views]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/data-views/llms.txt) — Connect to external data sources.
- [Importing Design Items]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/importing-design-items/llms.txt) — Import from Templates, Design Item Sets, Data Views, or XML.
- [Rules]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/rules/llms.txt) — Control inclusion and exclusion of content and questions.
- [Snippets and Snippet Links]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/snippets-and-snippet-links/llms.txt) — Reusable content for documents.
- [Wizard Step Management]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/wizard-step-management/llms.txt) — Reorder and sub-group wizard steps.
- [Repeating Item Groups]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/repeating-item-groups/llms.txt) — Multiple instances of similar data.
- [Local Template Options]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/local-template-options/llms.txt) — Template-level wizard and document settings.
- [Design Item Sets]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-item-sets/llms.txt) — Shared Design Items across Templates.
- [Template Sets]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/template-sets/llms.txt) — Combine Templates for merged or multiple documents.
- [Version Control]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/version-control/llms.txt) — Version management and relationships.
- [Exporting and Importing]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/exporting-importing/llms.txt) — Move Design Components between sites.
- [Workflows]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workflows/llms.txt) — Document drafting, approval, and finalization.
- [Design Component Approval]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/design-approval/llms.txt) — Approval process for Templates and Snippets.
- [WorkCenter and Document Wizard]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/workcenter/llms.txt) — Browser-based document creation.
- [Outlook Integration]({{ site.baseurl }}/template-designers/outlook-integration/llms.txt) — ActiveDocs in Microsoft Outlook.
